summary: Implemented US-004: Bootstrap three.js renderer. Created factory modules (clampPixelRatio, createRenderer, createScene, createCamera, createLights, createPlaceholderMesh) and an initRenderer orchestrator with resize handling, prefers-reduced-motion support, visibility-change throttling, and a dispose contract. Refactored shell to remove resize ownership. Added barrel export, unit tests (clampPixelRatio + initRenderer lifecycle), E2E smoke tests, and ADR-004. All quality gates pass (lint, typecheck, 44 unit tests, 13 E2E tests).
